narrative:
Erie County has 52,053 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.8 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 33.1% of registrants.
